title: Learn Java for Project building
description: Learn Java programming language within a month using our practical course. Write tons of code, solve over 500 coding problems and build beginner level projects. Prepare for a future in Back-end development.

modules.name: Strings and Text processing
modules.description: Learn about Java String operations like creation, concatenation, immutability, comparison, and manipulation using methods such as substring(), indexOf(), and replace(). These concepts are widely used in applications like data validation, input parsing, search engines, text processing, and building user-facing applications.

modules.name: Object Oriented Programming: Basics

Make your code reusable, improve readability, and simplify complex programs by breaking them into manageable, reusable blocks.
Learn basic Java OOPs concepts—classes, objects, methods, inheritance and polymorphism.
